home.heroSubtitle: Choose your mood and we will suggest the perfect drink from our cafe's menu.
home.featAiDesc: AI mood analysis recommends drinks from the active cafe menu.
home.featCafesDesc: Place your order instantly from the kiosk screen with one click.
home.featPersonalDesc: Engage customers with a modern, high-tech touch point in-store.
home.featLangDesc: Full support for English & Arabic with dynamic layout adaptation.

mood.title: What is your current mood?
mood.subtitle: Choose one of the quick feelings below or write how you feel in detail.
mood.placeholder: Write how you feel in detail (e.g., I feel exhausted and need something to wake me up)...

result.title: Mood Analysis & Suggested Drink
result.reasonLabel: Why this drink matches your mood?
result.orderSuccessMsg: Please proceed to the cashier to pay and collect your delicious drink.

cafesPage.title: Registered Cafés
cafesPage.subtitle: Explore cafés serving the best drinks with availability and work hours.

drinksPage.title: Drinks Menu
drinksPage.subtitle: Browse and discover available drinks and their details.

aboutPage.title: About Us
aboutPage.desc1: Mazaj is an intelligent kiosk platform that merges premium coffee culture with artificial intelligence to offer drink recommendations reflecting your feelings and psychological state.
aboutPage.desc2: We believe every cup of coffee or drink has a story and occasion, and we help you select the best cup with ease.

contactPage.title: Contact Us
contactPage.subtitle: Have a question or suggestion? We'd love to hear from you and will reply as soon as possible.
contactPage.name: Full Name
contactPage.success: Your message was sent successfully! Thank you.
